productDisplayName: Nike Men Backboard Black Casual Shoes
description: Get ready to move in style with these Backboard shoes from nike. The sleek design of these shoes makes it possible to pair it up with jeans and t-shirts for a cool casual look.UpperSynthetic uppers for protection and durabilityPerforations that act as design features and allow for greater breathability on the toeboxLace-ups for snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortAppliqued logo on the sidesBrand name appliqued on the tongue and printed behind the collarMidsoleCushioned footbed for all day comfortFull-length EVA midsole for cushioningOutsoleOutsole with pivot points and circular grooves for greater grip and easy 180 degree movementshoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
